name: Orange-Garlic Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove excess fat from the pork chops.
2. Squeeze the juice from the orange into a small bowl, keeping as much pulp as possible.
3. Press the garlic into the orange juice.
4. Add the juice of the onion (with no skin) to the mixture.
5. Stir in the powdered ginger and a pinch of pepper.
6. Place the pork chops in a shallow baking dish and cover with the marinade, letting stand for at least 45 minutes.
7. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat.
8. Remove the pork chops from the marinade and brown on both sides in the melted butter.
9. Return the chops to the baking dish and cover with the remaining marinade.
10. Cook, covered, for 10 minutes.
11. Remove the lid and continue cooking until fork-tender.
12. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
